'''Kiwip grass''' was a [[Grass/Legends|grass]] [[Diet/Legends|edible]] by [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolans]].<ref name="ATBPO" /> Around [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">Kiwip [[Grass/Legends|grass's]] mention in "[[And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale]]" takes place a few [[Standard month/Legends|months]] before the part of the story that is concurrent with {{Film|VI}}, the events of which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> the Ortolan [[Music/Legends|musician]] [[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]] was excited at the prospect of eating kiwip grass at an upcoming [[Foodstuff/Legends|dinner]], but he ultimately received neither the dinner nor the kiwip grass.<ref name="ATBPO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kiwip grass was mentioned in "[[And the Band Played On: The Band's Tale]]," a short story written by [[John Gregory Betancourt]] and published in the ''[[Tales from Jabba's Palace]]'' story collection in [[1995]].<ref name="ATBPO" />
